_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: For upregulated genes, DNA replication and cell cycle pathways were shared in the three pathway databases; 70% of GO terms associated to these genes were thus involved mainly in processes
details: Successfully performed GO term enrichment analysis identifying 70% of GO terms for upregulated genes involved in cell proliferation, mitosis and meiosis processes
